heading: Civil money penalty
label: 505 Civil money penalty
notes: References in TextThis section, referred to in pars. (1) and (8), means section 19 of act , which is classified to sections 142, 371b, 371b–1, 374, 374a, 461, 463 to 466, 505, and 506 of this title.Dec. 23, 1913

children.heading: First tier
children.label: 1 First tier
children.text: Any member bank which, and any institution-affiliated party (within the meaning of ) with respect to such member bank who, violates any provision of this section, or any regulation issued pursuant thereto, shall forfeit and pay a civil penalty of not more than $5,000 for each day during which such violation continues.section 1813(u) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: commits any violation described in paragraph (1);

children.label: ii
children.text: recklessly engages in an unsafe or unsound practice in conducting the affairs of such member bank; or

children.label: i
children.text: is part of a pattern of misconduct;

children.label: ii
children.text: causes or is likely to cause more than a minimal loss to such member bank; or

children.label: iii
children.text: results in pecuniary gain or other benefit to such party,

children.label: i
children.text: commits any violation described in paragraph (1);

children.label: ii
children.text: engages in any unsafe or unsound practice in conducting the affairs of such member bank; or

children.label: B
children.text: knowingly or recklessly causes a substantial loss to such member bank or a substantial pecuniary gain or other benefit to such party by reason of such violation, practice, or breach,

children.heading: Maximum amounts of penalties for any violation described in paragraph (3)
children.label: 4 Maximum amounts of penalties for any violation described in paragraph (3)
A
children.text: in the case of any person other than a member bank, an amount not to exceed $1,000,000; and

children.label: ii
children.text: 1 percent of the total assets of such member bank.

children.heading: Assessment; etc.
children.label: 5 Assessment; etc.
children.text: Any penalty imposed under paragraph (1), (2), or (3) may be assessed and collected by the Board in the manner provided in subparagraphs (E), (F), (G), and (I) of for penalties imposed (under such section) and any such assessment shall be subject to the provisions of such section.section 1818(i)(2) of this title

children.heading: Hearing
children.label: 6 Hearing
children.text: The member bank or other person against whom any penalty is assessed under this section shall be afforded an agency hearing if such member bank or person submits a request for such hearing within 20 days after the issuance of the notice of assessment. shall apply to any proceeding under this section.Section 1818(h) of this title

children.heading: Disbursement
children.label: 7 Disbursement
children.text: All penalties collected under authority of this section shall be deposited into the Treasury.

children.heading: “Violate” defined
children.label: 8 “Violate” defined
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “violate” includes any action (alone or with another or others) for or toward causing, bringing about, participating in, counseling, or aiding or abetting a violation.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: 9 Regulations
children.text: The Board shall prescribe regulations establishing such procedures as may be necessary to carry out this section.
